game_info.title: Brick Break - Tetris Puzzle Game
game_info.concept: **MiniGames Watch Games 24-in-1 (Brick Break):** Brick Break is a classic falling block puzzle game where players manipulate various tetromino-shaped blocks descending from the top of a vertical playfield. Players use a finger swipe left/right on the screen (or the Digital Crown on Apple Watch) to horizontally move the current falling block, tap the screen to rotate its orientation 90 degrees clockwise, and swipe down to instantly drop the block into place. The objective is to strategically stack blocks to form complete horizontal lines, which then clear from the playfield and award points, causing all blocks above to shift down. The game continuously increases the fall speed of blocks and the frequency of new block spawns as the player's score rises, escalating difficulty until blocks stack to the top of the playfield, ending the game. The primary goal is to achieve the highest possible score by clearing lines efficiently.
game_info.description: Brick Break is a classic block-stacking puzzle game where tetrominoes (four-block shapes) fall from the top of the playfield. Your goal is to arrange these falling pieces to create complete horizontal lines, which will clear and award points. The game speeds up as your score increases, making it progressively more challenging. Stack blocks efficiently and prevent them from reaching the top to achieve the highest score possible!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left / A: Move piece left
Arrow Right / D: Move piece right
Arrow Down / S: Soft drop (faster fall)
Arrow Up / W / Space: Rotate piece clockwise
Shift: Hard drop (instant drop)
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from game over)
ENTER: Start game

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic piece movement, rotation, and soft drop mechanics. Verify that pieces can move left/right, rotate properly, and soft drop increases fall speed. Ensure pieces lock into place when they reach the bottom or collide with other pieces.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Spawn a few pieces and move them left and right across the playfield. Rotate each piece multiple times to test all orientations. Use soft drop to accelerate falling. Let pieces stack at the bottom to verify collision detection works correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Pieces should move smoothly in all directions, rotate through all four orientations without clipping through boundaries, and lock into place properly when landing. Soft drop should visibly increase fall speed. No pieces should pass through walls or other pieces.
TEST_1.description: Test basic piece movement, rotation, and soft drop mechanics. Verify that pieces can move left/right, rotate properly, and soft drop increases fall speed. Ensure pieces lock into place when they reach the bottom or collide with other pieces.

TEST_1.expected: Pieces should move smoothly in all directions, rotate through all four orientations without clipping through boundaries, and lock into place properly when landing. Soft drop should visibly increase fall speed. No pieces should pass through walls or other pieces.

TEST_2.test_description: Test line clearing mechanics and scoring system. Verify that completed horizontal lines are detected, cleared from the playfield, and award points. Test that blocks above cleared lines drop down to fill the gap.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Intentionally place pieces to create complete horizontal lines at the bottom of the playfield. Create single, double, triple, and quad line clears. Monitor score increases and verify that blocks above cleared lines drop down correctly.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Complete lines should disappear with a visual effect. Score should increase based on number of lines cleared (more lines = more points). Blocks above cleared lines should fall down smoothly to fill gaps. The playfield should remain stable after line clears.

TEST_3.test_description: Test hard drop functionality and piece locking. Verify that hard drop instantly places pieces at the lowest valid position and locks them immediately. Test that the next piece spawns correctly after hard drop.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Use hard drop (Shift key) on various pieces at different positions. Test hard drop near walls, in the center, and with obstacles below. Verify pieces lock instantly and the next piece appears at the top.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Hard drop should instantly move pieces to the lowest valid position and lock them without delay. The ghost piece preview should align with where the piece lands. Next piece should spawn immediately at the top center after locking.
TEST_3.description: Test hard drop functionality and piece locking. Verify that hard drop instantly places pieces at the lowest valid position and locks them immediately. Test that the next piece spawns correctly after hard drop.

TEST_4.test_description: Test game over condition. Verify that the game detects when pieces stack too high and transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Test that restart functionality works from game over screen.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally stack pieces without clearing lines until they reach the top of the playfield. Verify game over triggers when a new piece cannot spawn. Press R to restart and verify the game returns to START screen with reset score and empty playfield.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Game should transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE when pieces stack above the spawn zone. Game over screen should display final score and "PRESS R TO RESTART" message. Pressing R should reset all game state and return to start screen.
TEST_4.description: Test game over condition. Verify that the game detects when pieces stack too high and transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Test that restart functionality works from game over screen.

TEST_5.test_description: Test piece preview and ghost piece systems. Verify that the next piece is shown in a preview box and that a ghost piece shows where the current piece will land.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Observe the next piece preview box as pieces spawn. Move and rotate pieces while watching the ghost piece indicator update. Verify ghost piece accurately shows landing position in various scenarios including complex stack configurations.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Next piece preview should always show the upcoming piece accurately. Ghost piece should appear as a semi-transparent version of the current piece at its landing position. Ghost should update in real-time as the player moves and rotates the piece.

TEST_6.test_description: Test increasing difficulty and level progression. Verify that fall speed increases as score rises and that level indicators update appropriately. Test that the game remains playable at higher speeds.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Clear multiple lines to increase score and level. Observe fall speed acceleration as level increases. Test piece control responsiveness at higher speeds. Verify level indicator updates correctly.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Fall speed should gradually increase as score/level rises. Level number should increment at regular score intervals. Game should remain responsive and playable even at higher speeds. Speed increase should be noticeable but not instant jumps.
TEST_6.description: Test increasing difficulty and level progression. Verify that fall speed increases as score rises and that level indicators update appropriately. Test that the game remains playable at higher speeds.

TEST_6.expected: Fall speed should gradually increase as score/level rises. Level number should increment at regular score intervals. Game should remain responsive and playable even at higher speeds. Speed increase should be noticeable but not instant jumps.

TEST_7.test_description: Test pause functionality and game state preservation. Verify that ESC properly pauses gameplay, physics stops, and unpause resumes correctly. Test that pause works during piece falling and immediately after piece lock.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Pause the game at various points: while a piece is falling, during rotation, immediately after locking, and right before line clear. Verify all animations and physics stop. Unpause and verify gameplay resumes exactly where it left off.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: ESC should toggle between PLAYING and PAUSED states. During PAUSED, all game logic should freeze but rendering should show current state with "PAUSED" overlay. Unpausing should resume game exactly as it was with no skipped frames or state corruption.
TEST_7.description: Test pause functionality and game state preservation. Verify that ESC properly pauses gameplay, physics stops, and unpause resumes correctly. Test that pause works during piece falling and immediately after piece lock.
